jobs.name: Current User Details
jobs.__comment: Displays detailed security information for the current user.

jobs.name: Local Users (Safe List)
jobs.__comment: Lists all local user accounts (read-only, no modifications).

jobs.name: Administrators Group Members
jobs.__comment: Shows which users are in the local Administrators group.

jobs.name: UAC Status
jobs.__comment: Checks if User Account Control is enabled (1 = enabled, 0 = disabled).

jobs.name: Firewall Status
jobs.__comment: Shows Windows Firewall status for Domain, Private, and Public profiles.

jobs.name: Open Shared Files
jobs.__comment: Requires administrator privileges. Without elevation, fails with 'Access is denied'. Also requires 'openfiles /local on' and a system reboot once before this command will produce any useful output.

jobs.name: All Drivers (First 30)
jobs.__comment: Exit code 1 is normal due to early pipeline termination; output is still valid.

jobs.name: Signed Drivers Only
jobs.__comment: Lists all signed drivers. Runs to completion, exit code 0.

jobs.name: Problem Drivers (If Any)
jobs.__comment: Filters driver output for lines containing 'error' (case-insensitive).

jobs.name: Plug and Play Devices
jobs.__comment: Lists PnP devices. Truncated to first 50 lines for performance. Exit code 1 is normal due to early pipeline termination; output is still valid.

jobs.name: Display Information
jobs.command: wmic desktopmonitor get name, screenheight, screenwidth
jobs.__comment: Retrieves monitor names and resolutions (may be empty on some systems).

jobs.name: Last 10 System Errors
jobs.__comment: Retrieves the 10 most recent System event log errors (Level=2 = Error).

jobs.name: Last 10 Application Errors
jobs.__comment: Retrieves the 10 most recent Application event log errors.

jobs.name: List All Event Log Names
jobs.__comment: Lists available event log names. Exit code 1 is normal due to early pipeline termination; output is still valid.

jobs.name: All Scheduled Tasks (First 30)
jobs.__comment: Lists scheduled tasks in LIST format, truncated to first 100 items. Exit code 1 is normal due to early pipeline termination; output is still valid.

jobs.name: Running Tasks Only
jobs.__comment: Filters scheduled tasks to show only those currently in 'Running' state.
